title: Implement tx event schema and materialized state persistence
summary: Implement transaction-aware event persistence and materialized state storage, including semantic memory fields.
outputs: Transaction event log schema persisted with tx_id, ticket_id, event_type, phase, step_id, actor, session_id
Materialized state persisted with semantic_summary and user_intent fields
acceptance_criteria: Event records include tx_id, ticket_id, event_type, phase, step_id, actor, and session_id.
Materialized state persists schema_version, active_tx, file_intents, integrity, last_applied_seq, semantic_summary, and user_intent.
Write ordering follows event append → state update → cursor persist.
Validation guards reject missing required transaction fields.

steps.description: Update event persistence to include required tx fields and actor/session metadata.
Persist materialized state schema with semantic_summary and user_intent.
Ensure write ordering matches the writer pipeline specification.
Add validation guards for required tx fields and intent metadata.

notes: Breaking redesign: no legacy schema compatibility.
Semantic memory must be deterministic and derived from canonical artifacts.
